title: ajania quercifolia
intro: Ajania quercifolia, also known as Manchurian wormwood or Manchurian chamomile, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ajania quercifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ajania quercifolia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
